project_type: Next.js 16 multi-tenant SaaS CRM with Drizzle ORM and PostgreSQL
build_system: npm with Next.js build pipeline, Drizzle for DB migrations
test_framework: Vitest for unit tests, Playwright for e2e
verification_instructions: 1. Run npx tsx scripts/seed-dev.ts to verify seed script compiles and runs. 2. Check TypeScript compilation with npx tsc --noEmit on the seed file.
setup_instructions: 1. npm install (already done). 2. PostgreSQL runs on host at DATABASE_URL. 3. Redis via docker-compose.yml.
environment_constraints: No Docker daemon available for docker build. PostgreSQL is on host machine at default connection string. Network is INTEGRATIONS_ONLY - cannot install new packages.
contribution_requirements: TypeScript strict, use existing patterns from drizzle/schema/*, use bcryptjs for password hashing.
key_patterns: DB connection: lib/db/pool.ts uses Pool from pg with DATABASE_URL. Drizzle ORM: drizzle/db.ts exports db via getDb(). Schema: drizzle/schema/index.ts re-exports all 30+ schema files. Password hashing: bcryptjs with 12 rounds (lib/auth/session.ts). Existing seed: scripts/seed-data.sql uses raw SQL.
directory_structure: Root: Next.js app with /app (pages), /lib (utilities), /drizzle (schema+migrations), /scripts (CLI tools), /deploy (production configs), /components (UI)
